ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of violation */,
  "violation_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation (e.g., at-fault accident, DUI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation type */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Premium amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium expires */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the premium applies */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "coverage_level" TEXT /* Level of coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_violations" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance company the user is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Report content in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report content was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium entry */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "previous_premium" REAL /* Previous premium amount */,
  "new_premium" REAL /* New premium amount */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_history_premium_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_id") REFERENCES premiums ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums_metadata" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the premium entry */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update premium, create report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
